title: Steve Blincoe
text: Home * People * Steve Blincoe Steve Blincoe , an American accountant, chess and computer chess aficionado, and one of the Worlds leading collectors of dedicated chess computers [1] as well as programs and accessories [2] . He served multiple times as moderator in CCC .
